faqData.question: How can I track my order?
faqData.answer: Once your order has been shipped, you will receive an email containing a tracking number and a link to track the delivery status of your package.

faqData.question: What is your return policy?
faqData.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy for unused and undamaged items in their original packaging. Please visit our Returns page for detailed instructions.

faqData.question: Do you ship internationally?
faqData.answer: Yes, we ship to most countries worldwide. Shipping costs and delivery times vary depending on the destination and will be calculated at checkout.

faqData.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqData.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, and Apple Pay. All transactions are securely processed.

faqData.question: How can I contact customer support?
faqData.answer: You can reach our customer support team via the 'Contact Us' page, by email at support@yourstore.com, or by calling our toll-free number during business hours.

aboutUsData.title: Trust & Security
aboutUsData.desc: We prioritize your security, ensuring that all transactions and data are kept safe and private.

aboutUsData.title: Premium Quality
aboutUsData.desc: We partner with top brands to deliver only the highest quality products to your doorstep.

aboutUsData.title: Customer First
aboutUsData.desc: Your satisfaction is our ultimate goal. Our support team is always ready to assist you.

privacyData.title: Information We Collect
privacyData.content: We collect information that you provide directly to us, such as when you create or modify your account, request on-demand services, contact customer support, or otherwise communicate with us. This information may include: name, email, phone number, postal address, and payment method.

privacyData.title: How We Use Your Information
privacyData.content: We may use the information we collect about you to provide, maintain, and improve our services. This includes using the information to process transactions, send related information (including confirmations and invoices), and provide customer support.

privacyData.title: Sharing of Information
privacyData.content: We do not share your personal information with third parties except as described in this privacy policy. We may share your information with vendors, consultants, and other service providers who need access to such information to carry out work on our behalf.

privacyData.title: Data Security
privacyData.content: We take reasonable measures to help protect information about you from loss, theft, misuse and unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration and destruction. Your data is encrypted and stored in highly secure environments.

privacyData.title: Cookies and Tracking
privacyData.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on our service and hold certain information. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent.

privacyData.title: Your Data Rights
privacyData.content: You have the right to request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data at any time. We are committed to giving you full control over your information.

header.title: Privacy Policy
header.subtitle: Your privacy is critically important to us. We have a few fundamental principles that we follow to ensure your data is secure and respected.

footer.title: Have more questions?
footer.text: Our Data Protection team is ready to help you anytime.

savedForLaterData.title: Smart watches fitness tracker black color

hero.title: Who We Are
hero.subtitle: Building the best destination for online shopping.
hero.description: Since our inception, we have been committed to providing a seamless, secure, and highly personalized shopping experience. We believe that shopping online should be as easy and enjoyable as visiting your favorite local store, but with the convenience of global reach.

valuesHeader.title: Our Core Values
valuesHeader.subtitle: Everything we do is guided by these principles to ensure you get the best.

values.title: Secure Shopping
values.description: Your data and transactions are protected by industry-leading encryption.

values.title: Fast Delivery
values.description: We partner with top logistics to ensure your items arrive on time.

values.title: Customer First
values.description: Your satisfaction is our priority. We are here to help you anytime.

sidebar.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our products, shipping, and returns. We're here to make your experience seamless.
sidebar.contactDesc: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Chat with our friendly support team.

footer.title: Have more questions?
footer.lead: Our legal and support teams are always available to help you understand all the details of our service.
